## Maintainer Triage

- Change type: `bug fix` / `documentation` / `enhancement` / `refactor` / `maintenance`
- Docs-only: `yes` / `no`
- Release impact: `none` / `patch` / `minor` / `blocking`
- Needs design review: `yes` / `no`

- [ ] Tests updated or not needed
- [ ] Documentation updated or not needed
